text: Dr. Ish Anand Search this site Embedded Files Skip to main content Skip to navigation Dr. Ish Anand South Delhi Neurology Clinic Neurology clinic with specialisation in treating headache, backache, epilepsy, stroke, dementia, spondylosis, and other neuroimmunological, neuromuscular & neurodegenerative disorders. To b ook an appointment: In-person and online video consultation: Kindly c all +91 9971934260 ( from 9 am to 9 pm) Online v ideo consultation: Download the MyFollowUp app by clicking on the link below and find me using doctor ID 184: Timings: Online video consultation: 5 PM to 8 PM from Monday to Saturday In-person at South Delhi Neurology Clinic, Defence Colony: 4 PM to 6 PM from Monday to Friday In-person at Sir Ganga Ram Hospital, Rajinder Nagar : 10:30 AM to 3 PM from Monday to Saturday About Dr. Ish Anand: Dr. Ish Anand is a distinguished neurologist with 3 3 years of experience in treating neurological disorders. He is presently the Co -Chairperson and Senior Consultant at the Department of Neurology, Sir Ganga Ram Hospital and Professor of Neurology at the Ganga Ram Institute for Postgraduate Medical Education & Research.
